title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nucleus Software - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nucleus Software - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Nucleus Software family as a Backend Developer in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Nucleus Software:
Nucleus Software is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software!
